Barack Obama: Barack Hussein Obama II (was born 4 August, 1961) is an American politician who served as the 44th president of America from 2009 until 2,017. Being a member of the Democratic Party, he was the first African American president. He received a Bachelor of Arts degree in political science from Columbia University in 1983, and then he worked as a community organizer in Chicago. In 1988, he joined Harvard Law School, where he was the first Black president of the Harvard Law Review. He used the results of participating as a teacher of politics and a teacher of community. Xi Jinping:
Biography of Xi Jinping
Xi Jinping (15 June 1953) is a Chinese politician who is the fifth top leader of the People's Republic of China. As the first son of the second marriage of Xi Zhongxun and Qi Xin, he was born as a “princeling” (child of a leader) because of his political family. However, he kept a low profile in the early stages of his career, working in the village of Liangjiahe, Shaanxi, during the Cultural Revolution (1969–1975). There, he joined the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) after several failed attempts, and he served as the party secretary of that area.

Since 1975, he went into political work by identifying himself with the village of Zhengding, Hebei, and identifying himself with the village of Beijing. After starting political work, he went into political work by identifying himself with the village of Beijing, and identifying himself with the village of Beijing. Since 1982, he went into political work by identifying himself with the village of Beijing, and identifying himself with the village of Beijing.

Since 2012, he went as the general secretary of the Chinese Communist Party (CCP) and chairman of the party’s Central Military Commission, and as president of China together with chairman of the state Central Military Commission since 2013. As the fifth top leader of the People's Republic of China, he went as chairman of the state Central Military Commission, and as chairman of the party Central Military Commission.

Xi Jinping went as chairman of the state Central Military Commission, and as chairman of the party Central Military Commission.

Political details:

Year 1975: He went to work in the village of Zhengding, Hebei.
Year 1982: He went into political work in the village of Beijing.
Year 2012: He went as general secretary of the CCP and chairman of the party’s Central Military Commission.
Year 2013: He went as president of China and chairman of the state Central Military Commission.
Year 2018: He went as chairman of the state Central Military Commission.

Dilma Vana Rousseff:
Biography of Dilma Rousseff
Dilma Vana Rousseff (14 December 1947) is a woman of Brazil who first got as President of Brazil from 2011 until her removal from office through the impeachment process on 31 August 2016. She is the only woman who has ever held the presidency of Brazil until now. Since March 2023, she has been the chairperson of the New Development Bank.

She first got as Minister of Mines and Energy from 2003 to 2005, then as Chief of Staff from 2005 to 2010. She was a socialist in her youth, and she was raised in a upper middle class family in Belo Horizonte.
